title: Robust Smoky Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A cultured and crumbly weeknight Jamaican dish featuring mayonnaise and grilled to perfection, this recipe is low-carb-friendly and packed with flavor. It is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, soy sauce, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread 4-5 pieces of chicken onto each bamboo skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking and grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Check the internal temperature of the chicken, it should reach 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped scallions or parsley if desired.
